fields.label: Message
fields.description: We kindly request that all inquiries regarding CATERING, GROUP RESERVATIONS, and BUYOUTS be directed to our dedicated Catering or Groups & Buyouts pages. These pages provide comprehensive information and the best ways to reach the respective departments. Thank you for your understanding, and we look forward to assisting you through the appropriate channels!

fields.label: Setup

Includes all the mixed & matched wooden and copper bowls you will need for the ordered items, risers, serving spoons, set up, delivery and pick up . We will pick up the dishes the same day and includes cleaning.

fields.label: Allery Information
fields.description: (Press Crtl to select multiple)

fields.label: RESERVATION POLICY
fields.description:
We kindly ask all guests to arrive together for prompt seating.
Reservations are held for 15 minutes past the scheduled time.
Enjoy up to 3 hours with us, including a little time to prepare for our next guests.
Thank you for helping us create a wonderful experience for all!

fields.label: CUSTOM PRIVATE EVENT DETAILS
fields.description: Please include number of guests, preferred date/time, date flexibility, menu preferences, budget, special requests, and any allergies or dietary restrictions.

fields.label: SUBTOTAL
fields.calculationFormula: {Catering Option:49} * {Head Count:59} + {Add Veg Appetizer +$3/ Person:87} * {Add Veg Appetizer +$3/ Person:119} + {Add Non-Veg Appetizer+$4/ Person:121} * {Add Non-Veg Appetizer +$4/ Person:129} + {Add Veg Curry+$5/ Person:122} * {Add Veg Curries +$5/ Person:128} + {Add Non-Veg Curry+$6/ Person:123} * {Add Non- Veg Curries +$6/ Person:130} + {Add Tandoor Grill Veg/Paneer+$7/ Person:120} * {Add Tandoori Veg/Paneer $6 / $7:131} + {Add Tandoori Grilled Chicken $ 7- $7.50:133} * {Add Tandoori Grilled Chicken $ 7- $7.50:124} + {Add Desserts +$1.5 -3.50/ Person:125} * {Add Desserts +$1.5 -3.50/ Person:127} + {Dinnerware:82} * {Dinnerware or Disposables Required?:76} + {Disposable Serving Spoons (7 Spoons + 2 Tongs) - $ 16:77} + {Setup:73}

69e2eb755150a.name: Catering Quote Draft
69e2eb755150a.subject: READY TO SEND: Catering Quote for {Name (First):1} {Name (Last):1} - {Event Date:41}
69e2eb755150a.message: CUSTOMER EMAIL: {Email:3} ---------------------------------------------- Dear {Name (First):1}, Thank you for choosing us to cater your event. Kindly find the attached quote with menu and pricing details for a catering order to be delivered on: {Event Date:41} at {Delivery time:36}. Please review the document and send us a confirmation if all the details are correct. Your order will be processed in the kitchen once we receive a confirmation. Our staff will be carrying a payment machine to facilitate the payment. Email us to make any changes or if you have any questions. Best regards, Ash Catering Manager Sula Indian Restaurant O: 604.215.1130 events.sula@gmail.com sulaindianrestaurant.com
